Catherine
(1525–1578)
memoryArtifacts.description:
The parentage or place of birth of Catherine are not known. 

She was probably born in or near Glemsford, Suffolk, England, around 1525. 

About 1540, she married John Strutt at St. Mary the Virgin Ch …

zh.lifeSummary: Catherine於1540年與John Strutt在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1578年8月18日之前在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德，埋葬在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine married John Strutt in 1540, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 18 August 1578, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, and was buried in Glemsford, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine a épousé John Strutt en 1540, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 18 août 1578, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Catherine hat 1540 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England John Strutt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 18. August 1578 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England und wurde in Glemsford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Catherine lei sposato John Strutt nel 1540, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 18 agosto 1578, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England, e fu sepolta a Glemsford, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherineは1540年にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでJohn Struttと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1578年8月18日以前にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで死去し，イギリススフォルクグレムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine(은)는 1540년 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 John Strutt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1578년 8월 18일 이전 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Catherine casou-se com John Strutt em 1540, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 18 de agosto de 1578, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine вышла замуж за человека по имени John Strutt в 1540 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 18 августа 1578 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия и была похоронена в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Catherine se casó con John Strutt en 1540, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 18 de agosto de 1578, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
